name: Vultr
description: Monitor Vultr cloud instances for infrastructure inventory and separation of environments

config.setupInstructions:
1. Log in to my.vultr.com
2. Go to Account > API
3. Enable API access if not already enabled
4. Copy the API key (or create a new one)
5. Paste it below

checks.name: Infrastructure Inventory
checks.description: Lists Vultr cloud instances for infrastructure inventory

checks.name: Separation of Environments
checks.description: Verifies Vultr uses multiple regions/VPC configs for environment separation
